_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: a significant toxic response appeared at a dosage of 80 mg/kg on day 14 following treatment...The tumour-to-body weight ratios were also significantly reduced in the Nutlin-3 & MG-132 groups
details: Nutlin-3 showed toxic response at 80 mg/kg on day 14; tumor-to-body weight ratios significantly reduced in combination group compared to single-agent groups
